item.dc:creator: shartyturtle

item.title: That's a lot of fish
item.description: That is how you educate! That is how you include everyone. https://www.upworthy.com/elementary-school-learns-sign-language Young students at Nansemond Parkway Elementary School in Suffolk, Virginia, wanted to be able to communicate with the cafeteria worker who served them breakfast and lunch everyday. So they learned how. Leisa Duckwall is deaf and had been working at the school for four years serving the students and staff. Because Duckwall cannot hear, she and the students did the best they could to make it work, until a teacher had an idea. Kari Maskelony, who teaches fourth grade, spoke with Duckwall using American Sign Language (ASL) and noticed the cafeteria went silent. Students watched in awe as the two women used their hands to communicate. Maskelony grew up in a family that was hard of hearing, so sign language was part of her life, according to My Modern Met. After seeing the reaction of students, Maskelony asked the kids if they would like to learn the language.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Wholesome post to brighten your day 1258
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/mZ262Pp Wholesome Post 1257 https://imgur.com/gallery/8vAi6I3 Wholesome Post 1256 https://imgur.com/gallery/vdt8Mcg Wholesome Post 1255 https://imgur.com/gallery/wGSormQ Wholesome Post 1254 https://imgur.com/gallery/0IuCs1v Wholesome Post 1253 https://imgur.com/gallery/09G6I82 Wholesome Post 1252 https://imgur.com/gallery/VnM5nLm Wholesome Post 1251
I include a Gofundme link in all of my posts to help raise money for people in need. I hope we can help https://www.gofundme.com/f/fund-morgans-longterm-mobility-aid
I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48
I hope this post brightened your day :) and i hope it is a lovely day for you! If you need to talk I am always available on discord (username HaveAGreatDay) and happy to listen. You matter, and if you are struggling please reach out for help. I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48

item.title: Its so simple!
item.description: EDIT: Wow, that was fast, thanks a lot everyone! Remember to win 3 Million to make... 3 Million! I do some reviews as a hobby, if you wanna check them, feel free to visit https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/ EDIT2: It was brought to my attention that this is, in fact, a parody account on twitter (thus why the bond rate is insanely high)... I honestly couldn't tell because my last boss did say something of the sort.
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: I’m finally escaping
item.description: In three weeks I’m going to start my new job as a member of IBEW. Fuck this place, the people, the politics, the heat, humidity **Edit for most viral** never made most viral before! Thanks for all the well wishers, I’m so excited

item.title: Where is our DK friend?!
item.description: I can't be the only one worried about Deaf Kitten, right? I mean, it's been like a week or so and no viral dumps, that's just unheard of and I'm concerned. Edit: @deafkitten this most viral post is for you!!!
